# Agent-Native

> Framework for building AI-native applications where agents and UI share state through a SQL database.

Agent-Native is an open source framework for building full-featured applications powered by AI agents. Apps are React frontends with Nitro backends. All state lives in a SQL database (SQLite locally, cloud databases like Turso/Neon/Supabase in production). The agent and UI read/write the same database — no filesystem dependency for data.

## Key Concepts

- **Data in SQL**: All app state lives in a SQL database via Drizzle ORM. SQLite works locally out of the box; set `DATABASE_URL` for cloud deployment. Local and production behave identically.
- **AI Through the Agent**: No inline LLM calls. The UI delegates to the agent via a chat bridge (`sendToAgentChat()`).
- **Agent Updates Code**: The agent can modify the app itself. Your tools get better over time.
- **Real-time Sync**: SSE streams database changes to the UI. When the agent writes to the database, the UI updates instantly.
- **Actions System**: Agent-callable actions via `pnpm action <name>` for complex operations.
- **Production Ready**: Built-in auth, OAuth, cloud database support, and deployment presets. Apps work locally in dev and deploy to production with the same code.
- **Embedded Agent Panel**: Every app includes an agent panel with chat and optional CLI terminal supporting Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, and Builder.io. Deploy to Builder.io Cloud for collaboration and visual editing.

## Quick Start

The fastest way to get started is to pick a template. Templates are complete, production-ready apps — not starter kits.

```bash
npx @agent-native/core create my-app --template mail
cd my-app
pnpm install
pnpm dev
```

Replace `mail` with any template name below. To start from a blank canvas instead, omit `--template`.

## Templates

- **Mail**: Superhuman-style email client with keyboard shortcuts, AI triage, and smart search — `--template mail`
- **Calendar**: Calendar app with Google Calendar sync, public booking page, and natural language scheduling — `--template calendar`
- **Content**: Content workspace with brand-aware AI writing, CMS publishing, media management — `--template content`
- **Slides**: AI presentation builder with 8 layouts, image generation, visual editing — `--template slides`
- **Video**: Video composition studio built on Remotion with track-based animation — `--template video`
- **Analytics**: BI platform with 20+ data connectors, SQL query explorer, dashboards, data dictionary — `--template analytics`

All documentation pages are available as raw markdown by appending `.md` to any docs URL:
